_legend.Enabled: true/false - false deactivates every module in this file
_legend.Includes: main config only: absolute paths of further config files to load
_legend.Version: optional pin: exact "1.2.3" or NuGet range "[1.0,2.0)" - omit for latest

Modules.Name: ImportExcel
Modules.Description: Read/write .xlsx without Excel installed - example entry, set Mode to Load/InstallOnly to activate
